author.bio: Architecting a new way for individuals to own and control their data.  #IPFS #Decentralized #Data #Apps. Builders of http://textile.photos.
author.name: Textile

content.text:
Looking for #awesome #ipfs #inspiration? Check out this list of projects, tools, and pretty much anything related to IPFS that are totally awesome (including our own https://textile.photos )!
https://github.com/ipfs/awesome-ipfs
